questions.question: Implement a word count program in Hadoop using MapReduce. What are the steps involved in writing the Map and Reduce functions for this task?
Implement a word count program in Spark using a programmer-friendly API. How do you handle edge cases such as empty files or non-UTF-8 encoded text?
Compare the performance of a word count program implemented in Hadoop using MapReduce versus Spark for a large dataset. What are the key differences in their design and execution?
